violations.text: 1) Add CCP Storage/Label calibrating thermometer and recording it in a calibration log in accordance with HACCP plan. 2) Weekly review is not observed temperature logs. 3) year HACCP review. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
